prompt:
Use case: subject-art replacement
Asset type: enemy sprite
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy subject portrait for an original game called Blood Rogue replacing a weak live enemy sprite. Depict Baal's Minion as a quick-footed demonic siege creature from Act V with thick hide, bony armor knobs, clawed hands, and a feral forward-lunging stance.
Subject: one creature only, clean full silhouette, no rider, no extra demons, no environment scene.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature action-RPG creature art, clearly stronger than a generic cutout.
Composition/framing: square 1:1 subject sprite, centered, readable at 128x128, body mostly visible, compact aggressive pose.
Lighting/mood: brutal, hungry, fast, siege-born.
Color palette: cinder black, bone ivory, dried crimson, ember orange, soot gray.
Materials/textures: thick hide, horn or bone protrusions, cracked claws, scarred flesh, ash, restrained rim light.
Background rules: transparent alpha preferred; if transparency fails, use a flat pure #00FF00 chroma background only. No painted backdrop, no cast shadow plate, no scenery.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no extra figures, no UI.
Avoid: no cartoon style, no anime, no toy-like proportions, no soft plush fur, no scenic battlefield.
